title: Russia Batters Kyiv in Overnight Attack
summary_full: On Saturday, Ukraine hit two warehouses in Russia in strikes that killed at least eight people and injured 62.
summary_public: On Saturday, Ukraine hit two warehouses in Russia in strikes that killed at least eight people and injured 62.
